Private check-in guide

Welcome to Viale Trastevere 108

Ring B-9 at the intercom, open the building door, walk through the corridor, then go to Stair B, 4th floor, and reach your apartment door.

📍 Viale Trastevere 108, Rome • Stair B • 4th Floor

Before you start

Keep this page open during arrival. Use the opening button only when you are physically at the building entrance or in front of your apartment door.

Your route

1
Find the entrance passage at Viale Trastevere 108.
2
Ring B-9 at the intercom and open the building door.
3
Walk through the corridor following the direction shown in the photo.
4
Go to Stair B, 4th floor, and reach the apartment door.
Entrance passage01
01

Find the building entrance

This is the entrance passage of Viale Trastevere 108.

Intercom — B-902
02

Ring B-9 at the intercom

Press the B-9 button on the intercom. Then press the button below to open the building door.

Corridor direction03
03

Go through the corridor

After the door opens, enter and continue through the corridor following the direction shown in the photo.

Then go to Stair B and reach the 4th floor.
Apartment door04
04

This is your apartment door

Once you reach the 4th floor, this is your apartment door. Press the button below only when you are in front of the correct door.

Need help?

Call or WhatsApp Michele if you have any difficulty during arrival.
